name: Patient X
history: Longstanding difficult interactions with the patient's mother. Strained communication and delayed sharing of significant events within the family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I can't say no to people, especially those close to me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to handle my responsibilities.
coping_strategies: Avoidance and compliance to avoid conflict.
situation: Preparing for an upcoming visit from parents.
auto_thought: I can't handle this visit; it will be overwhelming.
behavior: Avoidance of confrontation and compliance with others' demands.
